tasks.subject: Task 0: #waiting-room theater restructure + JetBrains Mono
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the #waiting-room inner markup (index.html lines 243-344) with the handoff README theater skeleton (.lobby-head / .lobby-body theater + .director-shell.dir-refined) — ALL pre-existing ids preserved, House-Rules ledger rows wrap the REAL hidden #theme-select/#hardcore-toggle/#tv-shows-toggle, new #theater-status/#seated-count/#seated-hint, #lobby-players is the empty seats-grid (renderLobby fills it in Task 1), #team-screen UNTOUCHED, no shared SVG defs. Append &family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@500;600;700 to the existing Google-Fonts <link> (line 65) before &display=swap.

**Files:** Modify public/index.html (line 65 font link; lines 243-344 = #waiting-room inner).

**Verify:** node id-count guard prints IDS_OK (all 14 pre-existing + 3 new ids exactly once, JetBrains Mono present); then cd C:/mm-phase7-5-2 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js server green (pure seam + server unaffected). Lobby DOM suites intentionally red until Task 1.

**Steps:** (1) edit the font <link> to add JetBrains Mono. (2) replace lines 243-344 with the README target markup verbatim (ledger hidden-checkbox pattern, ids preserved, empty #lobby-players seats-grid, #start-btn.btn.btn-primary.ref-cta + empty #add-bot-row). (3) run the ids+font verify + the unaffected suites. (4) branch-verify (git -C C:/mm-phase7-5-2 branch --show-current == phase7-5-2-theater-lobby) then commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/index.html"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-2 && npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["font <link> adds JetBrains+Mono:wght@500;600;700 before &display=swap; Plus Jakarta unchanged; one <link>", "#waiting-room inner = README theater target markup; #team-screen + everything outside #waiting-room byte-identical", "every pre-existing id present exactly once (lobby-code-display/public-room-toggle/mode-selector/mode-chip-classic..speed/mode-description/theme-select/hardcore-toggle/tv-shows-toggle/start-btn/lobby-players/lobby-settings) + new theater-status/seated-count/seated-hint; ledger rows wrap the real hidden inputs", "IDS_OK guard passes; npx jest client-tests/red-carpet.test.js server green (UNEDITED suites unaffected); lobby DOM suites red until Task 1 (expected)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: renderLobby theater seat-builder + rewritten lobby suites
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace ONLY ui-render.js lines 97-168 (the .entrance-card forEach) with a builder that renders exactly 8 <li.seat> (N occupied + rest empty) reusing the UNCHANGED 7.5.1 seam (playerCardModel; card.accentHue==SEAT_HUES[slot]→--avatar-hue, collision-free; diffArrivals+_seenPlayerIds for entering + a 1400ms id-keyed strip), per-seat own-<defs> chair SVG (module const SEAT_CHAIR_SVG verbatim from the README, added after _lastLobbyId), .seat-kick byte-identical removeBot/kickPlayer {lobbyId:gameState.id,targetId:p.id} condition amIHost&&p.id!==myPlayerId omitted on own seat, #seated-count/#seated-hint wired. Lines 1-96 + 169-end (team early-return, lobbyCodeDisplay, diffArrivals, theme/hardcore/tv, rollCameraLabel/#start-btn, add-bot, renderTeamScreen) BYTE-IDENTICAL. Rewrite client-tests/render-lobby.test.js + red-carpet-render.test.js + red-carpet-seat-table.test.js to the .seat contract + §4 behavioural pins; red-carpet.test.js + fixtures.js + red-carpet.js UNEDITED & green.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/ui-render.js (lines 97-168 + a SEAT_CHAIR_SVG const after L46). Rewrite client-tests/render-lobby.test.js, client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js, client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js.

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-5-2 && npx jest client-tests/render-lobby.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js client-tests/red-carpet.test.js green; then full cd C:/mm-phase7-5-2 && npx jest green; git -C C:/mm-phase7-5-2 diff --stat HEAD -- client-tests/red-carpet.test.js client-tests/fixtures.js public/js/ui/red-carpet.js EMPTY.

**Steps:** TDD — rewrite the 3 suites to .seat → verify FAIL → replace lines 97-168 with the 8-seat builder + add SEAT_CHAIR_SVG const (verbatim README §Chair SVG) → verify the 3 rewritten + red-carpet.test.js PASS + the unedited-file diff empty → full suite → branch-verify → commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/ui-render.js", "client-tests/render-lobby.test.js", "client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js", "client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-2 && npx jest client-tests/render-lobby.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-render.test.js client-tests/red-carpet-seat-table.test.js client-tests/red-carpet.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["renderLobby renders exactly 8 <li.seat> (first players.length occupied w/ .nameplate[.crown/.you-pill XOR .bot-pill]+.seat-person>.avatar-emoji+.seat-svg-wrap[.seat-spotlight+own-defs chair svg+.seat-kick omitted on own seat]+style --avatar-hue=card.accentHue+data-player-id; rest empty .seat[data-slot]+.seat-num 'SEAT 0X')", "--avatar-hue==card.accentHue (=SEAT_HUES[slot]): 8 distinct, host(players[0])=SEAT_HUES[0], never per-identity-hash, no stableId in #waiting-room", ".seat-kick emits byte-identical removeBot/kickPlayer {lobbyId:gameState.id,targetId:p.id} cond amIHost&&p.id!==myPlayerId omitted on own seat; .entering only for diffArrivals entering ids + 1400ms id-keyed strip; #seated-count/#seated-hint correct", "ui-render.js lines 1-96 & 169-end byte-identical (team early-return + lobbyCodeDisplay + diffArrivals + theme/hardcore/tv + rollCameraLabel/#start-btn + add-bot + renderTeamScreen UNTOUCHED)", "render-lobby/red-carpet-render/red-carpet-seat-table rewritten to .seat + §4 pins green; red-carpet.test.js+fixtures.js+red-carpet.js byte-identical & green; socket-handlers/showScreen/modal-factory/name-prompts+server/** byte-identical & green; full npx jest green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: delete dead 7.5/7.5.1 lobby CSS + append Theater section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete public/css/02-hero-lobby.css lines 729-980 (the PHASE 7.5 Red Carpet + PHASE 7.5.1 Seat-Table appended sections — .marquee*/.entrance-card*/@keyframes cardEntrance/.lobby-stage*/#waiting-room.lobby-panel widen/.director-panel*/.theme-select/.waiting-public-toggle/.roll-camera* the new DOM no longer emits); lines 1-728 (pre-7.5 base + non-lobby) BYTE-IDENTICAL. APPEND a PHASE 7.5.2 — THEATER LOBBY section lifted verbatim from design_handoff_lobby/Lobby Redesign.html <style> (lobby panel/header row/main grid/THEATER/.dir-refined ONLY) + README per-seat --avatar-hue velvet block + the 3 @keyframes (nameplate-drop/person-sit/spotlight-pulse)+hookup + responsive @media, with the 4 pinned adaptations: (1) no new color values (prototype indigo/amber→var(--accent-primary)/var(--accent-warm); chair HSL-from-(--avatar-hue) kept verbatim), (2) --avatar-hue is JS-set, (3) reduced-motion via the EXISTING global 06-states-anim.css block — NO per-rule @media(prefers-reduced-motion) (baseline .nameplate/.seat-person opacity:1 kept), (4) drop .dir-console/.dir-slate.

**Files:** Modify public/css/02-hero-lobby.css (delete 729-980; append Theater section).

**Verify:** cd C:/mm-phase7-5-2 && npx jest green; git -C C:/mm-phase7-5-2 diff public/css/02-hero-lobby.css = contiguous 729-980 deletion + EOF append, zero hunks <=728; node guard CSS_OK (no .entrance-card/.lobby-stage/cardEntrance/.dir-console/.dir-slate; has .seat-svg + nameplate-drop). Visual/responsive/reduced-motion eyeball user-side.

**Steps:** (1) delete lines 729-980 inclusive (pre-7.5 ends L727, blank L728). (2) append the PHASE 7.5.2 Theater section (verbatim prototype <style> sections + README velvet/keyframes/hookup + responsive) applying ONLY the 4 adaptations. (3) verify git-diff confined to 729-980+EOF-append (no hunk <=728) + CSS_OK + full npx jest green. (4) branch-verify then commit. Visual/responsive/reduced-motion eyeball flagged user-side.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/02-hero-lobby.css"], "verifyCommand": "cd C:/mm-phase7-5-2 && npx jest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lines 729-980 (PHASE 7.5 Red Carpet + PHASE 7.5.1 Seat-Table appended sections) DELETED; lines 1-728 (pre-7.5 base + ALL non-lobby rules) byte-identical, not edited/reordered", "appended PHASE 7.5.2 THEATER section = verbatim prototype <style> (lobby panel/header/main grid/THEATER/.dir-refined only) + README per-seat --avatar-hue velvet block + nameplate-drop/person-sit/spotlight-pulse @keyframes+hookup + responsive @media", "4 adaptations applied: no new color values (indigo/amber→tokens; chair HSL-from-(--avatar-hue) verbatim); --avatar-hue JS-set; reduced-motion via existing global block (NO per-rule, baseline .nameplate/.seat-person opacity:1 kept); .dir-console/.dir-slate dropped", "git diff confined to 729-980 deletion + EOF append, zero hunks <=728; CSS_OK guard passes; full npx jest green (CSS-only, unedited suites byte-identical); visual/responsive/reduced-motion eyeball flagged user-side"]}
```
